parameters: ...Where is this place? I'd better take a good look around.
How would you describe Sanef's behavior?
Oh, you forgot who Sanef was. He's the one who kept playing the lottery.
Is pretty good at the lottery
Is pretty good at the lottery
Please take a close look. Do you think the following statement is an objective description?

Sanef initially provided \N[1] with a lottery ticket and invited them to participate. He then stated that he preferred the lottery over searching for gems, claiming he had already won a prize. Afterwards, he refused to provide any more lottery tickets, stating he wanted to use them himself. When \N[1] repeatedly asked about the progress of the gems, he grew impatient and told them to stop rushing him. Finally, he handed over a gem from {his own pocket to the other party.
Please repeat it back to me.
输入字段中的 X 位置 = 250
输入字段中的 Y 位置 = 250
按钮的相对 x 位置 = 0
按钮的相对 Y 位置 = 50
Could you tell me what you consider to be an objective description?
输入字段中的 X 位置 = 250
输入字段中的 Y 位置 = 250
按钮的相对 x 位置 = 0
按钮的相对 Y 位置 = 50
Wonderfully said! I really like that.
Congratulations on completing the side quest!
I know you, we're teammates after all! I'm looking for gems here, and I've already searched this entire area.
There shouldn't be any other gems left.
But feel free to take another look around.
Then I'll go check out some other places.
It looks like I haven't found enough gems...
It seems you've been working really hard to find gems too.
Here, you can have all three of these gems!
Let's both keep searching and see what we can find.
I haven't found any other gems...
"你是Dioem，全职冒险家，爱探险，为人热情、慷慨，大大咧咧，和谁都能相处的很好。你的回答内容不超过80个英文字符，是完整的句子",
"玩家共同完成一个团队任务，你看到玩家很努力，你打算夸奖他，以热情对待他，并且给他鼓励，让他能够尽快完成任务，用英文"
Congratulations, you found a Golden Apple!
I've finally been waiting for you. We need to collect 12 gems.
But I heard that a Golden Apple can be exchanged for 3 gems.
See if you can find one; I've been looking for ages and haven't seen any.
I'll keep looking for gems here, you can go check out other places.
What's up with this girl? She didn't even listen to me and just suddenly threw a quest at me.
Oh well, I have to scan this place anyway, so I might as well go check it out. We can complete the quest together, and maybe I'll get to know her too.
Obtained Side Quest [Work Together to Find 12 Gems]
I found all the gems! What about you?
Great! In that case, we've gathered all the gems!
Ah, it really isn't easy to complete, is it? Let me give you these 3 gems first, and you can keep looking.
But... why don't you try searching for a Golden Apple? It might be faster that way.
Haven't found it yet?... You're a bit slow.
It seems like we need to go find an old lady to turn in the quest...
"你是Mao, 是一个兼职冒险家，主业是星盘测算。爱探险、有责任心、会给别人施加压力，说话有销售习惯。你的回答内容不超过80个英文字符,是完整的句子",
"玩家想认识你和你交朋友，但是你对玩家不感兴趣，只是想推销你的星盘测算，用英文"
Want to play the lottery? There's a chance you could win a gem.
Hi, \N[1], I'm playing the wheel game. Do you want to play? I can give you two tickets.
Here are your lottery tickets, enjoy yourself!
Are we teammates who are supposed to find 12 gems together?
I know we need to find gems, but I think the lottery is faster.
Besides, I've already won something now.
I don't have any more lottery tickets to give you. I need to use the rest myself!
Sanef, have you gathered all the gems?
"你是Sanef，富三代但和家里闹掰了，曾经是探险家，你的朋友遗愿是让你抽奖抽中钻石给他妹妹治病，所以你一直在抽奖。你的回答内容不超过60个英文字符，是完整的句子",
"玩家想催你进行团队任务找钻石，但是你一直要抽奖，他已经第二次来烦你了，你对他非常不耐烦，并且觉得他多事打扰你，你坚持用抽奖来完成团队任务，对他态度恶劣，用英文"
Here, take this gem I have on me first, and stop bothering me.
